assets.name: grass_block_tall
assets.meta_description: Isometric grass block tile with lush green top surface, dirt/grass sides, and subtle footprint marks. Tall variant with visible depth. Core ground tile for forest clearings and meadow areas.

hearts_mapping.description: Natural grass surface promotes calm and connection with nature

assets.name: cobblestone_four
assets.meta_description: Isometric arrangement of four gray stone cobblestone blocks. Used for paths, patios, and stone-paved areas in the forest village.

hearts_mapping.description: Solid stone path represents stability and resilience

assets.name: cobblestone_three
assets.meta_description: Three gray cobblestone blocks arranged in an L-shape. Variant stone path tile for creating natural-looking stone walkways and borders.

hearts_mapping.description: Stone path foundation

assets.name: cobblestone_sprout
assets.meta_description: Three gray cobblestone blocks with a small green plant sprouting between the cracks. Symbolizes growth through adversity — nature reclaiming stone.

hearts_mapping.description: Plant growing through stone symbolizes tenacity and perseverance

rules.description: Decorative tile that may trigger growth dialogue

assets.name: stone_slab_cracked
assets.meta_description: Flat isometric stone slab tile with natural crack patterns on the surface. Used for flooring in caves, ruins, or crafting areas.

hearts_mapping.description: Weathered stone surface

assets.name: grass_block_flat
assets.meta_description: Flat isometric grass tile with lush green surface, grass tufts on edges. Lower profile than tall grass block. For open meadow and field areas.

hearts_mapping.description: Open grass surface for peaceful exploration

assets.name: grass_block_clean
assets.meta_description: Simple clean isometric grass tile with smooth green top. Minimal detail variant for large open areas and backgrounds.

hearts_mapping.description: Clean grass surface

assets.name: dirt_block
assets.meta_description: Isometric brown dirt/mud tile block with pebble texture. Used for farm soil, unpaved areas, trails, and digging zones.

hearts_mapping.description: Soil ready for planting — supports autonomy in farming activities

rules.description: Plantable soil tile for farm scene

assets.name: barrel_short
assets.meta_description: Small wooden barrel with metal bands and open top. Can store items or water. Interactive container for resource gathering activities.

hearts_mapping.description: Container for collecting and storing resources — builds independence

assets.name: ladder_wooden
assets.meta_description: Rustic wooden ladder with log rungs and rope bindings. Used for climbing, building tasks, or accessing elevated areas. Represents challenge and perseverance.

hearts_mapping.description: Climbing the ladder requires tenacity and builds empowerment

rules.description: Interactive — player climbs up or down

assets.name: tent_red
assets.meta_description: A-frame red camping tent with wooden door flap. Shelter structure for forest campsite scene. Rest point where players can save progress or recover.

hearts_mapping.description: Safe resting place promotes inner harmony and self-reflection

rules.description: Enter tent to rest and reflect

assets.name: furnace_stone_ground
assets.meta_description: Tall stone brick furnace with metal grate on top, sitting on ground. Used for smelting, cooking, or crafting activities in workshop areas.

hearts_mapping.description: Crafting at the furnace builds empowerment through creation

assets.name: furnace_stone_elevated_a
assets.meta_description: Stone brick furnace elevated on a single wooden post. Variant A with post visible below. Used in elevated workshop or treehouse areas.

hearts_mapping.description: Elevated crafting station for advanced challenges

assets.name: furnace_stone_elevated_b
assets.meta_description: Stone brick furnace elevated on a single wooden post. Variant B with slightly different angle. Pair with Elevated A for workshop setups.

hearts_mapping.description: Elevated crafting station variant

assets.name: well_stone
assets.meta_description: Stone-and-wood water well with rope and bucket mechanism. Central gathering point in village scenes. Players can draw water for quests or interact with NPCs here.

hearts_mapping.description: Community gathering point — promotes social interaction and self-reliance

rules.description: Draw water or interact — central gathering point

assets.name: platform_wooden
assets.meta_description: Flat wooden platform with four corner posts. Used as a stage, display table, or foundation for building activities.

hearts_mapping.description: Platform for building and displaying creations

assets.name: sign_canvas_front
assets.meta_description: Wooden A-frame sign with canvas/parchment surface, viewed from front. Displays quest information, directions, or NPC messages. Front-facing variant.

hearts_mapping.description: Reading signs develops spatial intelligence and navigation

rules.description: Tap to read sign content — quest hints and directions

assets.name: sign_canvas_back
assets.meta_description: Wooden A-frame sign with canvas/parchment surface, viewed from back/side angle. Back-facing variant paired with front sign for isometric placement.

hearts_mapping.description: Back of sign — curiosity prompt

assets.name: pebbles_pair
assets.meta_description: Two small flat pebble stones. Decorative ground scatter for natural-looking paths and terrain. Can be picked up as collectible items.

hearts_mapping.description: Decorative ground element

assets.name: chest_wooden
assets.meta_description: Brown wooden chest with dark interior and leather clasp. Storage container for quest rewards, treasures, or collected items. Key interactive object.

hearts_mapping.description: Opening chests rewards exploration and builds autonomy

rules.description: Tap to open — may contain quest items or rewards

assets.name: door_short_front
assets.meta_description: Short wooden plank door viewed from front. Used as entrance to small buildings, fences, or gates. Isometric front-facing variant.

hearts_mapping.description: Doors represent choice and freedom to explore

assets.name: door_short_side
assets.meta_description: Short wooden plank door viewed from side angle. Isometric side-facing variant paired with front door for building walls.

hearts_mapping.description: Door variant for isometric walls

assets.name: door_tall_front
assets.meta_description: Tall wooden plank door viewed from front. Full-height entrance for cabins, workshops, or main buildings.

hearts_mapping.description: Main entrance — gateway to new areas

assets.name: door_tall_side
assets.meta_description: Tall wooden plank door viewed from side angle. Full-height isometric side variant paired with front door.

hearts_mapping.description: Side-facing main entrance

assets.name: forge_stone_short
assets.meta_description: Short stone brick forge/cauldron with open dark top. Low-profile crafting station for smelting and mixing activities.

hearts_mapping.description: Forge crafting builds skill and determination

assets.name: forge_stone_tall
assets.meta_description: Tall stone brick forge/tower with open top and leather flap. Tall variant of crafting station for advanced smelting activities.

hearts_mapping.description: Advanced forge for more complex crafting challenges

assets.name: hammer_wooden_large
assets.meta_description: Large wooden mallet/hammer tool with long handle. Building and crafting tool used in construction challenges. Can be equipped by player.

hearts_mapping.description: Using tools builds empowerment and resilience through effort

assets.name: hammer_wooden_small
assets.meta_description: Small wooden mallet tool. Compact building tool for lighter crafting tasks. Starter tool for new players.

hearts_mapping.description: Starter crafting tool for building confidence

assets.name: stone_small
assets.meta_description: Tiny isometric stone block. Ground decoration or collectible resource for crafting. Scattered around paths and terrain.

hearts_mapping.description: Decorative ground stone

assets.name: signpost_wooden_a
assets.meta_description: Tall wooden T-shaped signpost with log crossbeam. Direction indicator placed at path intersections and scene exits. Variant A facing.

hearts_mapping.description: Signposts support navigation and independent exploration

rules.description: Tap to read direction — may show route options

assets.name: signpost_wooden_b
assets.meta_description: Wooden T-shaped signpost variant B with shorter profile. Alternate angle for isometric placement at path junctions.

hearts_mapping.description: Alternate signpost for navigation

assets.name: log_pile_large_a
assets.meta_description: Large stacked pile of cut logs. Resource stockpile for building and crafting quests. Variant A arrangement.

hearts_mapping.description: Gathering and stacking logs teaches patience and persistence

rules.description: Tap to gather logs for crafting

assets.name: log_pile_large_b
assets.meta_description: Large stacked pile of cut logs. Variant B with slightly different arrangement. Pair with Large A for varied lumber yards.

hearts_mapping.description: Log resource stockpile

assets.name: log_pile_small
assets.meta_description: Small compact pile of cut logs. Smaller resource bundle, partially depleted or starter pile for crafting.

hearts_mapping.description: Small log resource

assets.name: stone_block_sprouted
assets.meta_description: Large isometric stone cube with cracked top surface and small green sprout growing from a crevice. Nature reclaiming stone — thematic piece for resilience areas.

hearts_mapping.description: Life growing through rock — resilience and tenacity symbol

rules.description: Decorative thematic tile — may trigger reflective dialogue

assets.name: mallet_on_pole
assets.meta_description: Wooden mallet head mounted on a long diagonal pole. Decorative workshop tool or construction marker.

hearts_mapping.description: Workshop tool marker

assets.name: fence_post_horizontal
assets.meta_description: Horizontal log fence section supported by two vertical posts. Used for enclosures, farm boundaries, and animal pens.

hearts_mapping.description: Boundary marker — defines areas

assets.name: tree_stump
assets.meta_description: Cut tree stump with visible rings. Seat, resting point, or evidence of past logging. NPC can sit on it during dialogue.

hearts_mapping.description: Sitting on a stump invites reflection and inner calm

rules.description: Sit down to rest and think

assets.name: stone_tiny
assets.meta_description: Very small flat stone pebble. Minimal ground decoration for adding natural scatter to terrain.

hearts_mapping.description: Tiny decorative stone

assets.name: horn_curved_a
assets.meta_description: Curved wooden horn or bugle instrument with leather bindings. Can be used as signal horn or decorative forest item. Variant A facing right.

hearts_mapping.description: Blowing the horn signals others — social communication

rules.description: Tap to blow horn — attracts nearby NPCs

assets.name: horn_curved_b
assets.meta_description: Curved wooden horn variant B facing left. Mirror of Horn A for isometric placement variety.

hearts_mapping.description: Horn signal — social

assets.name: chopped_log
assets.meta_description: Single chopped log with stone axe blade embedded. Result of woodcutting activity. Resource item or decorative workshop prop.

hearts_mapping.description: Evidence of effort and work completed

assets.name: bush_green
assets.meta_description: Lush green leafy bush. Forest vegetation for filling scenes, creating borders, and hiding collectibles. Medium-sized foliage.

hearts_mapping.description: Natural vegetation promotes calm and harmony

rules.description: May hide collectibles — tap to search

assets.name: stones_flat_pair
assets.meta_description: Two flat stepping stones of different sizes. Ground decoration for creating natural stepping stone paths through grass.

hearts_mapping.description: Stepping stone decoration

assets.name: rock_formation_large
assets.meta_description: Large gray rock formation with small green sprout growing at the base. Blocking obstacle or climbable terrain feature. Represents nature's persistence.

hearts_mapping.description: Large obstacle — overcoming it builds resilience and tenacity

rules.description: Large rock — may block path or hide items

assets.name: mushroom_red
assets.meta_description: Spotted red toadstool mushroom with smaller baby mushroom. Classic forest flora decoration. Collectible item for potion crafting or nature quests.

hearts_mapping.description: Discovering forest mushrooms connects with nature and builds spatial awareness

rules.description: Collectible mushroom — ingredient for nature quests

assets.name: barrel_broken
assets.meta_description: Wooden barrel with lid removed and stone pieces around it. Broken or emptied container. Decorative or post-interaction state of barrel.

hearts_mapping.description: Empty broken barrel

rules.description: Search broken barrel for hidden items

assets.name: campfire
assets.meta_description: Burning campfire on crossed log base with bright orange flames. Central gathering point for story moments, warmth, and NPC conversations. Key social interaction hub.

hearts_mapping.description: Campfire is the primary social gathering point — stories, warmth, and togetherness

rules.description: Gather around the fire for stories and social interaction

assets.name: dirt_block_stony
assets.meta_description: Isometric dirt block with embedded small stones and pebble texture. Rocky soil variant for transitional terrain between dirt and stone areas.

hearts_mapping.description: Rocky soil terrain

assets.name: stone_block_clean
assets.meta_description: Large clean isometric stone block with cracked surface and dark brick sides. Foundation tile for buildings, walls, and elevated areas.

hearts_mapping.description: Solid stone foundation

assets.name: slingshot
assets.meta_description: Green Y-shaped wooden slingshot with leather pouch. Equippable toy/tool for target practice challenges. Fun skill-building item.

hearts_mapping.description: Target practice with slingshot builds coordination and confidence

assets.name: cobblestone_l_shape
assets.meta_description: L-shaped arrangement of gray cobblestone blocks with green sprout in center crack. Corner path piece for creating winding stone walkways.

hearts_mapping.description: Nature persisting through stone

assets.name: pine_tree_light
assets.meta_description: Tall light-green pine/evergreen tree with triangular layered canopy and brown trunk on stone base. Primary forest tree for creating dense woodland scenes.

hearts_mapping.description: Trees represent stability, growth, and harmony with nature

rules.description: Forest tree — provides shade and ambiance

assets.name: pine_tree_bright
assets.meta_description: Tall bright yellow-green pine tree. Lighter color variant of forest tree for creating depth and variety in woodland scenes.

hearts_mapping.description: Bright tree adds cheerful energy to the forest

assets.name: pine_tree_autumn
assets.meta_description: Tall golden-orange autumn pine tree. Seasonal variant representing change and transition. Used for autumn-themed scenes or time progression areas.

hearts_mapping.description: Autumn tree represents accepting change — autonomy through adaptation

assets.name: bucket_small
assets.meta_description: Tiny wooden bucket or pail with metal band. Collectible container for water-carrying quests and farm chores.

hearts_mapping.description: Small container for independent task completion

assets.name: boulder_large
assets.meta_description: Massive gray boulder with weathered surface and small sprout at base. Major obstacle or landmark feature. Represents overcoming significant challenges.

hearts_mapping.description: The biggest boulder — overcoming it is a major resilience milestone

rules.description: Major obstacle — may require tools or quests to move

assets.name: cliff_edge_stone
assets.meta_description: Flat gray stone cliff edge platform with rounded drop-off. Used for creating elevation transitions, cliffs, and ledges in isometric terrain.

hearts_mapping.description: Terrain edge tile

rules.description: Cliff edge — non-walkable past the edge

assets.name: cliff_edge_dirt
assets.meta_description: Flat brown dirt cliff edge platform. Dirt variant of cliff edge for soil-based terrain transitions and farmland elevated areas.

hearts_mapping.description: Dirt cliff edge tile

assets.name: cliff_edge_grass
assets.meta_description: Flat green grass cliff edge platform. Grassy variant of cliff edge for meadow elevated areas and forest hillsides.

hearts_mapping.description: Grass cliff edge tile

assets.name: hedge_large
assets.meta_description: Large round dense green bush/hedge. Used for creating natural barriers, garden walls, maze elements, and private spaces in garden scenes.

hearts_mapping.description: Large hedge creates protected spaces for quiet reflection

assets.name: pine_tree_dark
assets.meta_description: Tall dark-green pine tree. Deeper green variant for creating forest depth, shadows, and background layering in woodland scenes.

hearts_mapping.description: Deep forest tree — represents depth and grounding

assets.name: stone_slab_dark
assets.meta_description: Dark gray flat stone slab tile with wet/muddy texture. Used for cave floors, dungeon areas, or damp forest clearings.

hearts_mapping.description: Dark stone floor
